era_context: Same as -2076: Old Kingdom decline in Egypt, post-Akkad city-state competition in Mesopotamia, Indus Valley urban civilization at peak. No specific events are attested to this year in surviving sources.
geographic_coverage_gaps: All regions; no year-specific documentation exists
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed. (No events are listed for this year.)
historiographic_note: Like -2076, this year is not distinguished in surviving historical records. Ancient chronologies operate at coarser temporal resolution than individual years for this period. The absence of events reflects the nature of the source base, not the absence of historical activity.
